concept_details.label: DETR
concept_details.definition: Detection Transformer; an end-to-end object detection formulation based on set prediction and object queries.

concept_details.label: deformable attention
concept_details.definition: Sparse multi-scale attention mechanism used to reduce DETR compute and improve convergence.

concept_details.label: denoising training
concept_details.definition: Training strategy used by DINO-style DETR variants to stabilize query learning and improve detection quality.

topic_relation_candidates.relation: DETR is a detection-transformer method family
real-time DETR competes with YOLO-style detectors
